stories.title: **Headline:** Cubs Walk-Off Third Night in a Row — 8-Game Streak, 14 Straight at Wrigley

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
The Cubs just walked off the Reds for the THIRD straight night.

8-game win streak. 14 consecutive wins at Wrigley — longest since 2008.

Michael Busch: bases-loaded walk in the 10th. Cubs 7, Reds 6.

Chicago is rolling. 🐻

#Cubs #NLCentral #MLB

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
Three walk-off wins in three nights against the same team.

Last time the Cubs did that to one opponent: 1943.

The 2026 Cubs at Wrigley are something special. 24-12. NL Central leaders. 🏡

#Cubs #Wrigley #MLB

facebook.image_caption:
```
Cubs 7, Reds 6 (10 inn.) — Michael Busch walks it off AGAIN. Three consecutive walk-offs. 14 straight Wrigley wins. This team is unreal. 🐻
```

**Key Facts (HIGH confidence):**
- Cubs beat Reds 7-6 in 10 innings on May 6, 2026
- Michael Busch delivered a bases-loaded walk off Brock Burke in the 10th inning
- Cubs' 8th consecutive win overall
- 14 consecutive Wrigley Field wins (longest since 2008)
- Third consecutive walk-off win vs. the Reds (first since 1943)
- 6 walk-off wins in first 37 games (30-year franchise first)
- Chicago record: 24-12 overall
- NL Central lead: 2.5 games over St. Louis Cardinals
- 18-3 in last 21 games
- 17-5 start at Wrigley is best after 22 home games since 1985

stories.title: **Headline:** Four-Way HR Race: Judge and Murakami at 14, Álvarez and Rice Charging at 12

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
The 2026 MLB home run race at a glance:

Aaron Judge (NYY): 14 🔥
Munetaka Murakami (CWS): 14 🔥
Yordan Álvarez (HOU): 12
Ben Rice (NYY): 12

Álvarez also leads MLB in OPS (1.245) and RBIs.

This is the most fun the HR race has been in years. ⚾

#MLB #HomeRuns #HRRace

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
Munetaka Murakami has 14 home runs in 2026.

That's his 14th extra-base hit. They are ALL home runs.

An MLB record since at least 1900. 

The White Sox rookie is doing something that has never been done before. 🤯

#Murakami #WhiteSox #MLB

facebook.image_caption:
```
Judge 14. Murakami 14. Álvarez 12. Rice 12. The 2026 HR race is officially a four-way battle — and it's only May. ⚾
```

x_posts.label: Post 3

.308 BA | 10 HR | 27 RBI | 34 games
97.1 mph exit velocity — leads ALL of MLB
70% hard-hit rate (2nd in baseball)

Walker is the story nobody saw coming. ⚡

stories.title: **Headline:** Skubal Best-Case Back in August — Tigers' Rotation Remains in Crisis

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
Tarik Skubal update: best-case back by early August.

More realistic: late August or September.

Current rotation: Valdez, Flaherty, Montero, Madden.

Also out: Mize (IL), Verlander (unavailable), Olson (full year).

The Tigers' rotation is in trouble. ⚾

#Tigers #Skubal #MLB

facebook.image_caption:
```
Tarik Skubal's surgery went well but he won't be back until August at the earliest. The Tigers are counting down the days. ⚾
```

research.facts:
Tarik Skubal Recovery Timeline
**Decision:** FOLLOW UP (of May 6 Story 6)
**Tier:** Tier 2
**Freshness:** Doctor's timeline assessment published ~May 4-5, 2026
**Sources:**
- Detroit News: https://www.detroitnews.com/story/sports/mlb/tigers/2026/05/04/tarik-skubal-could-rejoin-detroit-tigers-by-end-of-august-after-surgery/89937152007/

- MLB Trade Rumors: https://www.mlbtraderumors.com/2026/05/tigers-rumors-tarik-skubal-scratch-injury.html
**Key Facts (HIGH confidence):**
- Best-case Skubal return: early August
- More likely return: late August or early September
- Surgery performed: arthroscopic, remove loose bodies from left elbow
- Current Tigers rotation: Framber Valdez, Jack Flaherty, Keider Montero, Ty Madden
- Also on Tigers IL: Casey Mize. Also unavailable: Justin Verlander
- Reese Olson out for full 2026 season (shoulder surgery, February)
- Skubal is the two-time reigning AL Cy Young Award winner

stories.title: **Headline:** Braves Still Baseball's Best at 25-11 — Depth Will Carry Atlanta Deep Into October

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
The Braves lost to Washington Tuesday. They're still 25-11 with the best record in baseball.

Matt Olson. Drake Baldwin. Ozzie Albies. Michael Harris II.

Four players on MVP-caliber paces. One lineup.

The NL East race was over before it started. 🍅

#Braves #NLEast #MLB

facebook.image_caption:
```
Braves 25-11. MLB's best record. 8-game NL East lead. Olson, Baldwin, Albies, Harris — four MVP-level seasons in one lineup. 🍅
```

stories.title: **Headline:** May Milestone Watch — Judge's Path to 400, Schwarber 350 Done, Murakami's Historic Pace

x_posts.label: Post 6
x_posts.text:
2026 MLB Milestone Watch:

Schwarber: HR No. 350 (April 30) ✅
Judge: ~20 HRs from career No. 400
Chapman: passed Goose Gossage for 2nd all-time in relief Ks
Murakami: 14 XBH, all HRs — MLB record since 1900

History is being made. ⚾

#MLB #Milestones #Baseball
